The Picket Line Tape

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the boy trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. The boy thinks about two ways to do something. He says what he wants from the people listening. What is the connection?
